creator: ben.rubson@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 185720
gitlab-runner syslog patch

Hi,

Attached is a quick patch to make gitlab-runner --syslog work.
It also enables it in the RC file so that error log comes to syslog by default.
User can also configure the syslog tag used (may be useful when several runners are configured).

Perhaps we could think about integrating the last runner version into ports, including this patch ?

What about a pkg version too ?

Thank you very much !

Ben
